title: pelargonium patulum var. patulum
intro: Pelargonium patulum var. patulum, commonly known as the White Rose Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the Geraniaceae family. It is native to South Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, promote relaxation, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium patulum var. patulum include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are often used to calm the mind and body and promote a good night's sleep.
